A template file for testing autoescaping behavior in Flask templates.

# Purpose
The content defines a template structure for rendering text and HTML with different autoescape settings. The `{% autoescape false %}` and `{% autoescape true %}` tags control whether the content between them is automatically escaped, affecting how special characters are handled in the output. This configuration is used to ensure that text and HTML are processed correctly according to the desired escaping rules.
